---
title: Support and Contact
---

If you would like to find out more about Nebula, visit the [information page](https://networkinstitute.org/nebula-main/).

If you have any questions, send an email to [Radu Apsan](mailto:r.apsan@vu.nl) and [Marco Otte](mailto:m.otte@vu.nl). 

The Nebula team can also help with the following:

* **Advice and Support**: Not sure about what LLMs to use for your project, or need help running the experiment? The Nebula team can help. You can also read more about some of [our projects](https://networkinstitute.org/nebula-main/nebulaindepth/nebula-use-cases/).
* **Highly Sensitive Project Support**: If your project requires the use of AI and highly sensitive data, contact the Nebula team. They can set up an instance that only you can access.
